prose:
Fukui Reactivity Analysis for Phenol. The calculation was performed using DFT at the `standard` tier (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the provided file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. Fukui indices were derived from Mulliken partial charges.
The most electrophilic site (highest Fukui f+ index) is Carbon atom 3 (index 2) with a value of 2.1028319. The most nucleophilic site (highest Fukui f- index) is Oxygen atom 1 (index 0) with a value of 0.16201477.
